visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with short black hair, wearing silver-rimmed glasses and a grey flat cap, stands in front of a plain white wall. He is wearing a grey t-shirt with the 'Roots Athletics' logo in blue and yellow. He points his right index finger toward the camera with an energetic expression, mouth open as if speaking. (2) The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of the man's face. He has a slight smile and looks directly into the lens with raised eyebrows, conveying a sense of surprise or secret revelation. (3) The man holds up a white, compact electronic device (a smartphone gimbal). He uses his hands to unfold the device's arm, demonstrating its mechanical movement. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the plastic texture of the gadget. (4) He brings a light-colored iPhone with a triple-lens camera array toward the gimbal. A magnetic attachment snaps the phone onto the device. He rotates the gimbal handle to show the phone switching from a vertical to a horizontal orientation. Yellow and blue text overlays appear near the bottom. (5) The screen shifts to a close-up screen recording of a smartphone interface. It shows a teleprompter application with Chinese text scrolling over a camera preview. A small circular inset in the corner shows the man's face as he continues to demonstrate the software features.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @ 3ctim. [Subtitle]: 跟你說. (2) [Subtitle]: 一秒用iPhone變成穩定器. (3) [Subtitle]: 很重要的方法. (4) [Subtitle]: 什麼!!?. (5) [Subtitle]: 就它 Insta360 Flow 2 Pro. [Slogan]: Insta360 Flow 2 Pro. (6) [Subtitle]: 第一步 展開. (7) [Subtitle]: 第二步呢 把你的iPhone. (8) [Subtitle]: 直接給它. (9) [Subtitle]: 啪 上去. (10) [Subtitle]: 可以拍直的. (11) [Subtitle]: 也可以拍橫的. (12) [Subtitle]: 而且裡面還有提詞機喔!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian man wearing a grey flat cap, round glasses, and a grey 'Roots Athletics' t-shirt with a yellow smartwatch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist white-paneled wall providing a neutral studio-like background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male voice begins speaking in a friendly, enthusiastic tone. A bright, uptempo electronic dance music track with a strong 4/4 beat starts simultaneously. (2) A sharp 'snap' sound effect (finger snap) occurs as the vocal emphasizes a point. The music continues with a steady pulse. (3) A distinct mechanical 'click' and friction sound is heard as the gimbal arm is unfolded. The voice explains the hardware process. (4) A percussive 'magnetic snap' impact sound occurs exactly as the phone attaches to the gimbal. The BGM remains constant in energy. (5) A resonant 'pop' sound effect triggers during a visual transition. The male voice pitch rises as he describes the rotation feature. (6) A series of short 'ping' digital UI sound effects occur as the screen recording shows app interactions. The BGM maintains its high tempo until a quick fade-out at the very end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Step-by-Step Demonstration -> Feature Highlight
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a fast-paced product demonstration intended to promote the 'Insta360 Flow 2 Pro' smartphone gimbal. It uses an enthusiastic presenter and rapid editing to highlight the ease of use (magnetic mounting) and advanced software features (teleprompter) of the device.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presenter specifically names the product, shows the logo in text overlays, and demonstrates its features as a tutorial/review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a classic social-media 'tutorial' format with high information density, utilizing both visual cues and synced sound effects to maintain viewer engagement.
